title: VeloraOS 1.10.19 - Backend Recovery
releaseNotes: Hardens backend startup and recovery to prevent Nginx being left on a 502 Bad Gateway after an update.
Requires the VeloraOS backend to remain active and pass repeated health checks before an update is committed.
Captures backend systemd status and journal output when deployment fails, then restores the previous installation.
Adds a standalone Backend Rescue script for installations currently showing 502 Bad Gateway.
Preserves persistent TLS identity, Local CA download fixes, Chat stability, model intelligence and PWA support.
